nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to list down the different steps I have to do to complete this feature

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I usually collaborate with it throughout the task until i complete it

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.label_negative: AI unsuitability for creative and architectural decisions
nodes.grounding_span: with problem solving tasks, AI would be suitable and think of multiple solutions very quickly, but with the designs and styling, i usually love to tackle and decide it myself

nodes.label: AI memory and context retention
nodes.label_negative: AI context loss and re-establishment hassle
nodes.grounding_span: i want the AI to keep all the context i gave, but if it started to become slower, i would actually create a new chat

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: i'm able to minimise the time to write the code

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: i would still try to understand all the code the AI gives rather than just applying it without thinking

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: i usually love to tackle and decide it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for technical setup
nodes.grounding_span: These scripts and files are all done with AI which I'm really satisfied with

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for coding
nodes.grounding_span: the code it gave has either lots of bugs, or can't even compile

nodes.label: Preference for self-handling styling and schema design
nodes.grounding_span: with the designs and styling, i usually love to tackle and decide it myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: Ai would definitely be a good buddy over the next few years in my daily work tasks

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative debugging — persistent back-and-forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: i kept interacting with the AI to come up with different potential solutions to solve the bug

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation — creative vs. mundane
nodes.grounding_span: with problem solving tasks, AI would be suitable ... but with the designs and styling, i usually love to tackle and decide it myself
